description: Composite crypto risk-on score must be above the configured minimum.
Universe breadth above the 50-day moving average must be strong enough.
BTC 63-day drawdown must not be worse than the configured limit.
BTC must be above its 50-day moving average when required.
BTC must be above its 200-day moving average when required.
ETH must be above its 50-day moving average when required.
BTC 21-day return must be positive when required.
Raw gate must pass for 2 consecutive day(s).
Final V26 risk gate after all checks and confirmation-day logic.
